description_long: This is a high-top canvas sneaker in a muted gray color, featuring a classic Converse All Star design. The shoe has a white rubber toe cap and a white midsole with a thin black stripe running along the edge. Metal eyelets secure white laces in a standard criss-cross pattern, and the iconic circular Converse All Star logo patch is visible on the ankle area of both sides. The upper material appears to be durable canvas, while the sole is made of vulcanized rubber. The shoe's overall appearance is clean, structured, and well-crafted, suitable for casual urban wear.
description: A gray high-top canvas sneaker with white laces, rubber toe cap, and Converse All Star logo patch on the ankle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, logo patch, and full lace arrangement.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the white toe cap, laces, and tongue alignment.
description_view_2: Side view showing the right profile, logo patch, and eyelets.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the heel and collar opening.
attribute_logo: Circular Converse All Star patch on the ankle, white background with blue star and black text.
